Car_brand_classification_CNN.short_description: A project to classify logos of eight car brands using convolutional neural networks, including transfer learning with VGG16, data augmentation, and evaluation with confusion matrices.
Car_brand_classification_CNN.main_goal: To accurately classify images of car brand logos from eight classes using CNN models and transfer learning techniques.
models_used: Basic CNN with two Conv2D layers
Transfer learning with VGG16 base and custom dense layers
Transfer learning with VGG16 base using preprocess_input

Cracow_Real_Estate_Price_Prediction_2025.short_description: A project to predict apartment prices in Krakow using data scraped from gratka.pl in May 2025. It involves data scraping, extensive feature engineering, data cleaning, and evaluation of multiple regression models to identify the best price prediction model.
Cracow_Real_Estate_Price_Prediction_2025.main_goal: To develop an accurate model for predicting apartment prices in Krakow by leveraging scraped real estate data, performing detailed feature engineering, and comparing various machine learning models to select the best performing one.

LIDAR_point_cloud_classification_ANN.short_description: Classification of airborne laser scanning (ALS) LIDAR point cloud data from Krakow into multiple categories including ground, vegetation heights, buildings, noise, and water using various machine learning and neural network models.
LIDAR_point_cloud_classification_ANN.main_goal: To accurately classify LIDAR point cloud data points into predefined categories using machine learning and deep learning techniques, with a focus on improving classification accuracy especially for difficult classes like vegetation and water areas.
models_used: Artificial Neural Network (ANN) with Dense and Dropout layers

NLP-Classification_of_tweets_about_airli.short_description: This project classifies the sentiment of airline-related tweets using machine learning and deep learning models, including Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, and LSTM with custom embeddings and Word2Vec embeddings.
NLP-Classification_of_tweets_about_airli.main_goal: To develop and compare models that classify the sentiment of tweets about airlines into positive or negative categories, excluding neutral tweets.
